overall.description: A nighttime scene from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) depicting a cowboy character initially walking while leading a horse with a lantern, then mounting and riding through open prairie grasslands. The journey progresses along a dirt path under a cloudy, moonlit sky, eventually reaching a railroad crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie dirt path at night

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path while leading a horse, holding a lantern that illuminates the ground ahead

notable_agents.action: horse walking calmly alongside the character, being led by the reins

entered.detail: unpaved dirt trail winding through the prairie grass
isolated oak and pine trees dotting the landscape
dark mountain range silhouetted against the cloudy night sky
tall dry grass lining both sides of the path
heavy cloud cover partially obscuring the moon

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a dark prairie night with a character walking along a dirt path, leading a horse by the reins. A lantern casts a warm circular glow on the ground ahead, illuminating the dry grass and scattered trees while distant mountains loom under cloudy skies.

events.description: character mounts the horse and transitions from walking to riding at increased speed

agents.ego_description: riding the horse at a steady canter across the open prairie, navigating the dirt path

notable_agents.action: horse galloping steadily through the grassland with the character mounted on its back

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence line marking a property boundary
wooden telegraph pole with crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The character mounts the horse and the pace quickens to a canter across the open prairie. The camera follows from behind as they ride along the dirt path, passing scattered trees and approaching a wooden fence line with utility poles visible on the right.

events.description: approaching and beginning to cross wooden railroad tracks

agents.ego_description: riding the horse across the railroad tracks, carefully navigating over the wooden ties

notable_agents.action: horse carefully stepping over the railroad tracks with the rider

entered.detail: wooden railroad ties and steel rails crossing the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The horse and rider approach and cross a set of railroad tracks cutting through the prairie. The wooden ties and steel rails are illuminated by the lantern light as the horse carefully steps over them, with utility poles lining the right side of the tracks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark prairie night that transitions from a slow walk to a steady ride toward a railroad crossing. It begins with a character leading a horse by the reins along a dirt path, where a lantern casts a warm circular glow on the dry grass and scattered trees beneath cloudy skies. As the character mounts the horse, the pace quickens to a canter across the open prairie, with the camera following from behind as they pass a wooden fence line and utility poles. The scene then shifts toward the horizon before the horse and rider approach a set of railroad tracks cutting through the landscape. Finally, the lantern light illuminates the wooden ties and steel rails as the horse carefully steps over the tracks, flanked by the receding line of utility poles.
